enemy_1107_uoffcr_2.ability: Can use long-ranged weapons to attack  and

enemy_1279_sgbdg_2.name: Famiglia Terrorizer
enemy_1279_sgbdg_2.desc: An exceptionally herculean famiglia strongman, known for his fiery temper. He does not begrudge the visits he pays to the relatives of others, but during key moments, his word is more resolute than stone.
enemy_1279_sgbdg_2.ability:
More likely to be attacked by allied units
Increases Blood Debt when defeated

enemy_1278_sgbow_2.name: Elite Famiglia Crossbowman
enemy_1278_sgbow_2.desc: Famiglia-trained crossbowmen with a wealth of experience. Their shots are more accurate, and more deadly as well. Famiglie always respect the ironclad order, so these crossbows are never upgraded into better models, and Arts remain just as essential as ever.
enemy_1278_sgbow_2.ability: While under the Asset Liquidation status, attacks are converted into Arts damage

enemy_2036_syshop.name: Cannot
enemy_2036_syshop.desc: A mysterious trader who roams the barrenlands, selling anything that exists in civilization.
enemy_2036_syshop.ability:
Cannot be attacked, will not deplete Life Points on leaving the field
Periodically releases random chemicals that affect the battlefield

enemy_1165_duhond.name: Dublinn Sniffer Hound
enemy_1165_duhond.desc: An organism controlled by the Dublinn forces. They were originally purchased from a mercenary group. Equipped with a refractive mask crafted by Shadowcasters, they are rather resistant to regular Originium Arts.

enemy_1166_dusbr.name: Dublinn Scout
enemy_1166_dusbr.desc: A scout for the Dublinn forces. With superb concealment techniques, they are the cornerstone of the Dublinn forces' guerilla maneuvers. Equipped with a refractive mask crafted by Shadowcasters, they are rather resistant to regular Originium Arts.

enemy_1166_dusbr_2.name: Dublinn Scout Leader
enemy_1166_dusbr_2.desc: A scout leader in the Dublinn forces. The scouts under their command are the cornerstone of the Dublinn forces' guerilla maneuvers. Equipped with a refractive mask crafted by Shadowcasters, they are rather resistant to regular Originium Arts.

enemy_1174_duholy.name: Dublinn Companion Guard
enemy_1174_duholy.desc: A member of the Dublinn forces' elite operations squad. The structure of this squad mimics the military system of ancient Minos. The shields they wield are the culmination of many nations' technologies, providing cover for their partners while advancing, and protecting all nearby allies from harm.
enemy_1174_duholy.ability:
More likely to get attacked by your units
When a  is nearby, activates a field that reduces nearby allied units' ASPD
Refraction

enemy_1176_dusocr_2.name: Dublinn Evocator Leader
enemy_1176_dusocr_2.desc: An evocation caster leader in the Dublinn forces who can control fireballs, they are more adept at using Originium Arts than their underlings. Their leader's teachings reverberate in their minds as they work to purify the corruption of Terra in raging flames.
enemy_1176_dusocr_2.ability: Controls  that move along the ground and explode after hitting a melee ally unit, dealing Arts damage and Burn; damage dealt decreases with distance moved

enemy_1173_duspfr.name: Dublinn Flamerazer
enemy_1173_duspfr.desc: A special squad that uses flamethrowers in the Dublinn forces. Their leader's teachings reverberate in their minds as they seek to reforge Terra amidst the endless flames.
enemy_1173_duspfr.ability:
Continuously deals Arts damage and Burn for the skill duration
Upon death, explodes and deals Arts damage, knocking down nearby Tattered Pillars and instantly defeating other

enemy_1099_nbkght_2.name: Nameless Elite Knight
enemy_1099_nbkght_2.desc: An independent Kazimierz knight with some degree of achievement, though not enough to inspire any confidence. Sooner or later, they'll probably get swallowed up by the competition.

enemy_1181_napkgt_2.name: Knight Territory Hibernator
enemy_1181_napkgt_2.desc: A commonly seen burly knight whose Knightclub affiliation is unknown, considered rogue. They're often found passed out drunk in dark alleyways, and should be avoided as they demonstrate ferociously violent tendencies when woken up.
enemy_1181_napkgt_2.ability:
Remains Standby for a certain period in areas with  and does not attack
If visibility is gained on its location, immediately becomes active

enemy_1183_mlasrt_2.name: Armorless Union Cleanup Squad Leader
enemy_1183_mlasrt_2.desc: A leader of the cleanup squad personally trained by Roy. They lead the squad in place of Roy, who refuses to work, and are very experienced. The squad has adopted some kind of bounty system and is often very thorough in their tasks. Their attacks inflict Corrosion.
enemy_1183_mlasrt_2.ability:
Every attack deals Corrosion
After several attacks, the next attack deals more damage

enemy_1104_lfkght_3.name: 'Left-hand' Tytus Topola
enemy_1104_lfkght_3.desc: His nose is high as the sun, and he's almost as terrifyingly strong, if much, much colder. And look how many fans have lined up for him! He's 'Left-hand' Tytus Topola! He weakens his enemies' resolve, crushes their spirit, sneering down at them as they fall to their knees in surrender. That's a Left-handed victory!
enemy_1104_lfkght_3.ability:
Significantly decreases ATK of the unit with the highest ATK for a period of time
Rebirth

enemy_1135_redman.name: 'Redmark' Eradicator
enemy_1135_redman.desc: A special mercenary sniper who excels at ambushing targets exposed in harsh environments. 'Redmark Contracts' are tailor-made for elite and powerful mercenaries with a distinct lack of morals. The initiators of such contracts are ruthless and definitely up to no good.
enemy_1135_redman.ability:
Invisible
Only performs ranged attacks against allied units caught inside the

enemy_1140_merhd.name: Tactical Hound
enemy_1140_merhd.desc: An infected creature controlled by a Caster. Hounds are widely used by mercenaries, though some Perros object to it.

enemy_2003_rockman.name: Lost Colossus
enemy_2003_rockman.desc: An experimental creation of a certain caster from the Spires of Leithanien. This colossus was originally made to be a servant, but the old Spire caster forgot to tell it who to serve…
enemy_2003_rockman.ability: Can throw a rock that inflicts a very long Stun (will not target a unit that is already Stunned)

enemy_2004_balloon.name: Jetman
enemy_2004_balloon.desc: One of the dessert-time jokes among Columbians involves a strange man who calls himself a 'Master Thief,' puttering around with a self-made jetpack. The most valuable thing he's stolen is a single burdenbeast. However, the fact that he made his own jetpack might mean that he really is a master.
enemy_2004_balloon.ability: When blocked, this unit will take off for a period of time (this effect has a cooldown)

enemy_2005_axetro.name: 'Forsaken One'
enemy_2005_axetro.desc: 'The rescuers found a security guard who had been heavily corroded by Originium... already turned into a terrifying monster... carnage everywhere... countless casualties... whereabouts unknown.' —Rim Billiton mining record
enemy_2005_axetro.ability: Continuous attacks will increase ATK and ASPD, up to a limit. This effect will reset after a few seconds after this unit stops attacking

enemy_1016_diaman.name: Metal Crab
enemy_1016_diaman.desc: An infected wild creature, completely covered in metal. Though most conventional weapons are not very effective against them, they aren't as heavy as they seem, and also move slowly. Due to their low intelligence, they are easily controlled by enemy casters for use as cannon fodder during invasions.

enemy_1178_dscorp_2.name: Undertide Gloompincer α
enemy_1178_dscorp_2.desc: A Gloompincer that escaped from the arenas and adapted to life in the city's sewers. It has grown used to the darkness and become much more savage. It has increased Movement Speed under the cover of night.
enemy_1178_dscorp_2.ability: When in areas with no visibility, Movement Speed increases

enemy_1100_scorpn_2.name: Vicious Training Gloompincer
enemy_1100_scorpn_2.desc: Infected creatures commonly found in the great lakes and rivers of Kazimierz, these male gloompincers are fed special hormones and made more aggressive than the regular ones. They're a cruel tool to train knights and entertain fight spectators.

enemy_1270_nhstlk_2.name: Rampaging Rotchaser
enemy_1270_nhstlk_2.desc: Originium Arts creation of the Nachzehrer King. They do not understand the concept of healing, even if they are stopped. They exist only to create death. Thoughts are incompatible with death, and they never stop.
enemy_1270_nhstlk_2.ability: Attacks cause the target to take Arts damage over time; effect removed when the target is healed

enemy_1335_bldrat_2.name: Starving Gnawbeast
enemy_1335_bldrat_2.desc: An Infected Creature that appears in dark places. It has a high reproductive capacity, and is commonly found everywhere. It's currently starving! Be careful, hungry creatures tend to be more violent!
enemy_1335_bldrat_2.ability: Inflicts Bleed on allied Operators after several attacks

relics.name: Topographical Map
relics.desc: A hand-drawn map that exudes a sense of antiquity. The labels and corresponding terrain have been enlarged, and there seems to be something off about its scale.
relics.usage: +1 Deployment Limit, all friendly units gain +4% DEF

relics.name: Conch of Divine Whispers
relics.desc: Sound it, and gods you've never seen or even heard of will answer your call. Actually, it's just a hollow conch shell.
relics.usage: +1 Deployment Limit, all friendly units gain +4% HP

relics.name: Night-Whispers in the Forest
relics.desc: A special aromatherapy set prepared for field operators by the Convalescent Garden, consisting of fifteen herbal extracts in 172 different combinations. When the wind wends into wooded vales, all creatures lower their voices, and one can find respite.
relics.usage: +2 Deployment Limit, all friendly units gain +6% DEF

relics.name: Church Alms Meal Voucher
relics.desc: In the declining coastal towns of Iberia, certain churches will provide alms in the form of meals, which their believers can redeem using vouchers. As for how these vouchers are distributed, that is a secret.
relics.usage: +2 Deployment Limit, all friendly units gain +6% HP

relics.name: Red Bow Tie
relics.desc: The first present Phantom gave Miss.Christine. She is really fond of it.
relics.usage: Hope +2, Deployment Limit +1

relics.name: Solo Music Box
relics.desc: An old music box. The music does not play when the box is opened, nor does the figure inside show any signs it is about to move. There is not a peep, and no one is breaking out in dance. Before she begins her performances with Phantom, the lead actress stares blankly into the music box.
relics.usage: Hope +4, Deployment Limit +1

relics.name: Pried Open Toolbox
relics.desc: The tool box of the troupe's prop master. From nails to dummy props, it has everything.
relics.usage: Hope +4

relics.name: Antiquated Sheet Music
relics.desc: A tattered piece of sheet music. The notes can no longer be clearly read. No one knows for certain what story this piece was meant to tell.
relics.usage: Hope +4

relics.name: Letter of Termination Contract
relics.desc: You can break free from this troupe with just one signature.
relics.usage: Hope +4

relics.name: Universal Key
relics.desc: An old, silver key. It can open any door. As the keeper, the troupe's butler naturally needs a key that unlocks all the secrets here.
relics.usage: Hope +6

relics.name: Antique Coins
relics.desc: An ancient, rusty coin, weathered to the point that one can no longer identify its age. Things like these are all too common throughout Terra's barrens.
relics.usage: Immediately gain 10 Originium Ingots

relics.name: Actor's Jewelry Box
relics.desc: A box containing all kinds of shattered jewelry. The young lead actor wore this jewelry and stepped onto the stage, in the end falling from its highest point.
relics.usage: Immediately gain 18 Originium Ingots

relics.name: Game Room Admin Access Card
relics.desc: With this, you have become master over Rhodes Island's entertainment privileges. Please exercise caution when processing the various strange applications from the operators... and remember to lock the door every day.
relics.usage: Immediately Promote an Operator (Does not require Hope)

relics.name: Miss.Christine Petting Ticket
relics.desc: You have the lady's permission!
relics.usage: Immediately Promote 2 Operators (Does not require Hope)

relics.name: Regional Action Plan

relics.name: Comprehensive Operation File
relics.desc: A vessel sailing upon the land, like treading upon thin ice. Remember to always expand your overall view.
relics.usage: 5-star Operators cost -2 Hope to recruit

relics.name: Secret HR Letter
relics.desc: '■■■ gave this to you? Guess there's no problem then.'
relics.usage: 6-star Operators cost -2 Hope to recruit

relics.name: Rhodes Island Tactical Transceiver
relics.desc: Hang in there, help's on the way.

relics.name: Seaweed Salad

relics.desc: A Mama John's candy product. The orange flavor, cheap and delicious, is a best-seller among children.
relics.usage: +1 Squad Size Limit, all friendly units gain +1% ATK

relics.desc: Dossoles' famous coffee-flavored candy product. Has real caffeine added, to keep you wide awake from clock-in to overtime.
relics.usage: +2 Squad Size Limit, all friendly units gain +2 ASPD

relics.name: Screaming Cherry
relics.desc: A Mama John's candy product. Though the niche vinegar-pickled cherry flavor can't compete with the best-sellers in popularity, there have always been a small group of loyal and dedicated consumers. Rumor has it that one of Mama John's directors loves this flavor.
relics.usage: +2 Squad Size Limit, all friendly units gain +2% ATK

relics.name: Pitt's Assorted Fruits

relics.usage: +3 Squad Size Limit, all friendly units gain +3% ATK, DEF, and HP

relics.name: Extra-Pungent Coffee Beans

relics.usage: +1 Squad Size Limit, +1 Deployment Limit, +1 Objective Shield

relics.name: Blue Silk Scarf
relics.desc: A lady's elegant scarf. Her appearance is a sign that it is safe here.

relics.usage: Hope +4, Squad Size Limit +1

relics.name: Pure Gold Expedition

relics.usage: Hope +4, Squad Size Limit +1, Deployment Limit +1

relics.name: 'Durin Overground'
relics.desc: In this expedition account, we get a glimpse of how those who live underground see those who live on the surface.

relics.name: 'Gaulish Toponym Origins'
relics.desc: A book of historical place names that Mint dug out of the Doctor's office. Calais-blason is mentioned in the book.
relics.usage: +6 Objective Shield

relics.name: Hot Water Kettle

relics.name: Special Suppressor
relics.desc: An enhanced suppressor developed by Rhodes Island that can better keep the Infected from losing control of their Originium Arts.
relics.usage: +2 Max Life Points, recover 2 Life Points

relics.name: Stone Gargoyle
relics.desc: A palm-sized sculpture. Supposedly these are handmade gifts given out by the Gargoyles as a sign of friendship.
relics.usage: +3 Max Life Points

relics.name: Vampire's Bed
relics.desc: A lavish-looking coffin that matches the castle's aesthetics well. However, Warfarin says this is merely a stereotype.
relics.usage: +4 Max Life Points

relics.name: Proof of Longevity
relics.desc:
A tree branch that has withered and flourished.
When it is withered, it grows anew. When it is thriving in its fullest, it fades away yet again.
relics.usage: +6 Max Life Points

relics.name: Banshee's Kiss
relics.desc: Outsiders make extraordinary displays of bravery that far surpass their normal abilities. However, as one of the few male Banshees out there, this has become far too common a sight to Logos.
relics.usage: Hope +8

relics.desc: Even though it thrice brought the city to ruins, it yet shines radiantly in its flawless form. Even today, the Sargonian emperor in possession of the gem has yet to find another piece of jewelry matching its brilliance, leaving it with naught but gunsmoke for a companion.
relics.usage: Immediately gain 25 Originium Ingots

relics.name: Blunt Claws - Training
relics.desc: A formidable set of equipment to provide strength, an indomitable heart to press forward bravely.
relics.usage: Immediately Promote a Vanguard Operator (Does not require Hope)

relics.name: Bend Spears - Training
relics.desc: Some people use swords because they don't know how to use crossbows or Arts. Others use swords because that's all they need.
relics.usage: Immediately Promote a Guard Operator (Does not require Hope)

relics.name: Iron Guard - Training
relics.desc: Scars symbolize glory, but who will remember the soldiers who were cut a bit too deeply?
relics.usage: Immediately Promote a Defender Operator (Does not require Hope)

relics.name: Fatal Bolts - Training
relics.desc: 'Either you learn to control your ignition, or you learn to discern your target. Got it?'
relics.usage: Immediately Promote a Sniper Operator (Does not require Hope)

relics.name: Broken Wand - Training
relics.desc: 'After watching the 'performance' of certain casters, I decided to quietly put away the Leithanian textbook.'

relics.name: Stalwart Aid - Training
relics.desc: Their tactics are always diverse and colorful.
relics.usage: Immediately Promote a Supporter Operator (Does not require Hope)

relics.name: Healer's Path - Training
relics.desc: When the day comes when everyone is a doctor and can even cure the disease known as life, we will no longer need doctors.
relics.usage: Immediately Promote a Medic Operator (Does not require Hope)

relics.name: Rusted Blade - Training
relics.desc: When conducting live combat drills with Specialist Operators, please be prepared to be 'beaten up thoroughly before you are prepared.'
relics.usage: Immediately Promote a Specialist Operator (Does not require Hope)

relics.name: Victorian 'Scrap' Medal
relics.desc: A knight's medal that Siege threw together and awarded to Dagda on the spot. The materials used are pitiful, but it holds a lot of meaning to Dagda.
relics.usage: Gain +20% Command EXP from battles

relics.name: Spectrum Analyzer
relics.desc: Please be careful regarding the abnormal phenomena in Sami. The results from measuring electromagnetic radiation and analyzing the specimen's micro-crystals are completely incompatible.
relics.usage: Anti-Interference Index +1, +2 Objective Shield

relics.name: Leisure Time
relics.desc: The children are experts at picking up all sorts of things to build their own play-kingdom. The wetland dwellers are accustomed to the outsiders always abruptly abandoning their vehicles halfway to their destination.
relics.usage: Squad Size Limit +1, Anti-Interference Index +1

relics.name: Tranquil Spring Current
relics.desc: After escaping a siege of wind and snow by following the sound of water drops, this specimen has become a protective charm for the research team.

relics.name: Assault Co-op - Sharp Blade

relics.usage: Increases the DEF of Vanguard and Guard Operators by +10% for each Vanguard or Guard Operator in the combat squad

relics.name: Fortification Co-op - Phalanx
relics.desc: Like a huge ship running over rubble.

relics.name: Ranged Co-op - Remote Strike
relics.desc: If you can solve the problem from a reasonable distance, why do you have to literally butt heads?
relics.usage: Increases the ATK of Medic and Sniper Operators by +8% for each Medic or Sniper Operator in the combat squad

relics.name: Ranged Co-op - Assassination
relics.desc: Can't tell friends from foes at this distance? Unload a volley at them then. The enemies are the ones that failed to avoid it.
relics.usage: Increases the ASPD of Medic and Sniper Operators by +6 for each Medic or Sniper Operator in the combat squad

relics.name: Sabotage Co-op - Elimination
relics.desc: External destruction, internal disintegration.
relics.usage: Increases the ATK of Caster and Specialist Operators by +8% for each Caster or Specialist Operator in the combat squad

relics.desc: Don’t worry about accuracy. Take enough shots, and you’re guaranteed to land something!
relics.usage: Increases the ASPD of Caster and Specialist Operators by +6 for each Caster or Specialist Operator in the combat squad

relics.desc: A laurel of bones, the token of Signora Sicilia. This symbol of order will smooth the turbulence of all desires, for conflict is not allowed. Genuine or counterfeit, it still demands you to kneel.

relics.name: Worn-out Group Photo
relics.desc: Do you know someone in the photo?
relics.usage: All enemy units have -12% DEF

relics.desc: Once their desire to survive overwhelms their terror, the famished Iberians will devour this 'food,' subsequently turning into Sea Terrors on some ordinary day.

relics.name: Rosmontis's Embrace

relics.usage: All enemy units have -30% DEF

relics.desc: A black vinyl. DO. NOT. TOUCH. IT.

relics.desc: Even this old, outdated steam armor seems to carry with it the resplendence of when the Victorian monarchs cast their glory across half the world.

relics.desc: A very sharp letter opener. It was one of the favorite possessions of the last Ursus emperor, and as such it was very rarely used to actually open letters.

relics.desc: A highly decorative rapier for nobles. Used by Gaulish nobles first and foremost, though perhaps a little fragile for a military weapon.

relics.name: Vieux Vanguard's Blade
relics.desc: Prior to its downfall, Gaul first witnessed the sacrifices of its Vieux Vanguards.

relics.name: Necklace of the Presence

relics.name: Silver Forks
relics.desc: One for dealing with actors who botch their performances, one for dealing with incompetent playwrights, and one for anyone who needs it.

relics.desc: She never capitulated, even after enduring countless trials and tribulations. Her muzzle belched tongues of flame that burned like an angry sun, and the glow above her head was brighter than the daylight itself. Buried here is Outcast, our friend.

relics.usage: All friendly units have +20% HP

relics.name: First Aid Kit
relics.desc: '...Please use antibiotics and ethanol additives under the supervision of professionals...' —Rim Billiton Production Safety Manual
relics.usage: All friendly units have +35% HP

relics.name: Unknown Instrument
relics.desc: Don't ask. It's for your own good.

relics.name: Rusted Razor
relics.desc: If you cut yourself with this, you know what will happen.
relics.usage: All enemies take +15% Physical damage

relics.name: Carriage Driver's Whip
relics.desc: As the troupe's carriage driver, he has no name and no past. His life is meaningful only when he whips his burdenbeasts.
relics.usage: All enemies take +25% Physical damage

relics.name: 'Avenger'
relics.desc: A gift from Theresis and set up by Theresa, this is the very first weapon that Ascalon received after her inaugural mission as part of the Military Commission.
relics.usage: All enemies take +35% Physical damage

relics.name: Standard Anti-Riot Instrument
relics.desc: Standard equipment of the Ursus Guard. Comes with an intermittent blinding Originium Arts effect. Unfortunately, not many Guards out there remember this when push comes to shove.
relics.usage: All enemies take +20% Arts damage

relics.name: Emperor's Collection
relics.desc: The Sami revere their wild lands more than anything, and this fragment of the vast wilderness sleeps in the personal collection of the Emperor of Ursus.
relics.usage: All enemies take +30% Arts damage

relics.name: 'Brilliant Lament'
relics.desc: Their blood yet flows. He should not have left this place.
relics.usage: All enemies take +40% Arts damage

relics.name: Live Rose
relics.desc: Is it you who nourishes her, or is it her who protects you?
relics.usage: All friendly units receive +20% healing effectiveness

relics.name: White Flower Crown
relics.desc: A floral veil used in Vampire rituals. Its once vibrant redness has been sucked empty, leaving only a pale white color.
relics.usage: All friendly units receive +30% healing effectiveness

relics.name: Actor's Perfume
relics.desc: Troupe actors put this on before going onstage. Stable yet aromatic fragrances like this can help them ease pressure. That's how it seems on the surface, at least.
relics.usage: All friendly units recover 1% of their Max HP per second

relics.name: Designer's Ruler
relics.desc: Carefully measured with data and experience, those who wear this armor are known to be several orders of magnitude luckier.
relics.usage: All friendly units have +15% Physical Dodge

relics.name: 'Arts Killer'
relics.desc: Considering how Originium Arts and music go hand in hand in Leithanien, it's quite amazing someone came up with the bright idea of combating Arts with noise like this.
relics.usage: All friendly units have +15% Arts Dodge

relics.name: Dancer's Bracelets
relics.desc: The audience breaks into applause as the well-trained dancers waltz around the traps on stage. None of them are aware of the brushes with death the performers have just been through.
relics.usage: All friendly units have +10% Physical and Arts Dodge

relics.name: Doll House
relics.desc: All kids need at least one set.
relics.usage: +10 Starting DP

relics.name: Miniature Stage Model
relics.desc: The red paint has not yet dried. Careful. Don't get that paint on your hand.
relics.usage: +20 Starting DP

relics.name: Dreambind Castle Model
relics.desc: You've seen this place, and you once wandered the castle, yet you now hold it in your hand. Is this real, or is it all a dream?
relics.usage: +30 Starting DP

relics.name: Jet-Black Dance Shoes
relics.desc: The Columbian dancer's steps are firm and strong, her taps reverberating loudly in the air as she strikes the ground.
relics.usage: Can deploy Melee Operators on High Ground tiles

relics.name: Pure White Dance Shoes
relics.desc: The Ursus dancer's steps are swift and elegant, her body moving as she wills.
relics.usage: Can deploy Ranged Operators on Low Ground tiles

relics.name: Ancient Gaulish Silver Coin
relics.desc: A coin once circulated in the now fallen nation of 'Gaul.' It is in very good shape, making it highly valuable as a collector's item.
relics.usage: All Operators start with +6 SP

relics.name: Bank of Gaul Check
relics.desc: An extravagant checkbook plated in gold and silver. Can no longer be cashed.
relics.usage: All Operators start with +12 SP

relics.name: 'Second Economic Reform Act'
relics.desc: With this bill as the starting point, Gaul formally began its path to become a hegemonic empire.
relics.usage: All Operators start with +18 SP

relics.name: Vanilla Soda
relics.desc: Bolívar's cheap specialty drink dates back hundreds of years. It is mixed with a variety of spices, and is known for not being very good.

relics.name: Fowlbeast Liver Pate
relics.desc: A small jar of fowlbeast liver pâté. Bright and vividly colorful, it is eaten only by nobles.
relics.usage: Increases the SP regen rate of Auto Recovery skills by +0.35/s

relics.name: Dreaming Essence
relics.desc: Supposedly the Banshees make their aromatics only for their beloved. A single drop is enough to enchant just about anyone, bringing out any artist's inspiration and creativity.
relics.usage: Increases the SP regen rate of Auto Recovery skills by +0.5/s

relics.name: Captain Morgan's Wine
relics.desc: A wine produced in the Iberian region. Despite having gained popularity in the heart of Victoria's bustling cities, it is now discontinued.
relics.usage: Increases the SP regen rate of Offensive and Defensive Recovery skills by 1 SP per 3s

relics.name: Water of Life
relics.desc: The strongest Ursine liquors go straight to one's head, but it's said that the healthy Ursine adult can down several bottles.
relics.usage: Increases the SP regen rate of Offensive and Defensive Recovery skills by 1 SP per 2.5s

relics.name: Royal Liqueur
relics.desc: The fine wines of the fallen nation of Gaul have now become prized treasures for collectors. The place of production has moved to Leithanien, but the technique has been lost.
relics.usage: Increases the SP regen rate of Offensive and Defensive Recovery skills by 1 SP per 1.5s

relics.name: String Puppet
relics.desc: The more you struggle and try to break free, the tighter the strings get. Do you really think you are still thinking rationally?
relics.usage: Enemies receive 700 Arts damage per second when stunned, frozen, or bound

relics.name: 'Children's Puppet'
relics.desc: A simple puppet made by Iberian children using trinkets found on the seacoast. Supposedly just holding it tight will give you much richer dreams.
relics.usage: Enemies receive 1000 Arts damage per second when stunned, frozen, or bound

relics.name: Victory Horn
relics.desc: Blow the horn, cry out, and scatter our foes with its roar!
relics.usage: Increases the duration of single-instance status effects such as stun, cold, or freeze by 100%

relics.name: Flash Camera
relics.desc: Every photo shot by this camera is washed out in white, with only the victim's twisted expression faintly visible.
relics.usage: Increases the duration of single-instance status effects such as stun, cold, or freeze by 110%

relics.name: Therapy Tape
relics.desc: He tried to stop you from listening. He said it was dangerous. He said you should not stay. Do you understand now? You are listening to his song.
relics.usage: Increases the duration of single-instance status effects such as stun, cold, or freeze by 150%

relics.name: Old Fan
relics.desc: When it rains for several days on end, the old Yanese Tianshi complains to his friends about the pain in his knees, before casually waving his fan and driving away the rainclouds. It is about time he taught this trick to his young apprentice, currently working at the Central Judicial Office.
relics.usage: All Operators gain +10% ATK for every different type of Operator class in the squad

relics.name: Nachzehrer's Cane
relics.desc: Life is the Nachzehrer's sustenance and currency.
relics.usage: When a friendly unit is overhealed, nearby enemies take Arts damage equal to the overheal amount

relics.name: Scout's Scope
relics.desc: Lock on, aim, fire, and destroy the enemy's will to resist, all in the name of a better future that Scout will never see. Maybe you can do it for him.
relics.usage: Enemies take increased damage from friendly units as range increases (max 100%)

relics.name: Black Tulip
relics.desc: The Silence crushed the Iberians, so she wishes to speak up. If her words are not sharp enough, then her sword will speak for her.
relics.usage: Friendly Operators gradually gain ATK when not using a skill, up to a maximum of +60% after 60 seconds; bonus is reset when skill ends

relics.name: Spinach Pack
relics.desc: Many Cautus out there believe that popping the contents of this can into their mouths will grant them immense strength. The marketing's effectiveness is a classic success story in the industry.
relics.usage: All friendly units have +60% ATK for one second after their skill becomes active

relics.name: Wrath of Siracusans
relics.desc: The signature pasta dish of an 'authentic Siracusan restaurant' that once operated in the capital of Gaul. The dish's unique taste, and particularly its sauce—a blend of thick chocolate sauce and Originium Slug liver—earned the praise of many Gaulish nobles. Supposedly, though, this dish nearly caused a diplomatic crisis between Siracusa and Gaul.
relics.usage: All friendly units have +100% ATK for one second after their skill becomes active

relics.name: King's New Lance
relics.desc: Beautiful wishes made in dire straits can bring hope, even if they are not necessarily the truth.
relics.usage: When Life Point is 1, all friendly units have +50 ASPD

relics.name: Castle's Offspring
relics.desc: With enough time, this box will become a whole new stage.
relics.usage: All Operators gain +300 DEF and +30 RES after being deployed for 100 seconds

relics.name: King's Buckler
relics.desc: Keep your eyes straight ahead, and let your stalwart heart resist all hardship.
relics.usage: When Life Point is at 1, all Operators have +2 Block

relics.name: King's Staff
relics.desc: Let go of worthless pomp and treat others with kindness. They will no doubt return in kind.
relics.usage: When Life Point is at 1, all Operators recover an additional 1 SP every 2 seconds

relics.name: King's Crown
relics.desc: O Nameless King, may you continue to bless Iberia, even should your kingdom fall to ruin.
relics.usage: When Life Point is at 1, all friendly units have +50% ATK, increased to +150% ATK if you have collected 3 or more King's Collectibles

relics.name: 'Glorious Kazimierz'
relics.desc: A Kazimierzian best-seller that adapts the deeds of the arena's brightest-shining knights into a novel. Nearl, who was exiled but returned to reclaim her laurels, occupies a considerable portion of its pages.
relics.usage: Operators gain +70% ATK for 6 seconds after dodging

relics.name: 'The Return'
relics.desc: This Kazimierzian best-seller is said to be a collective creation by fans. 'Nearl' has already become an amalgamation of many ideals and fantasies. 'For her, exile was not an escape. She came back, and stood alone against the era's torrents.'
relics.usage: Operators gain +130% ATK for 6 seconds after dodging

relics.name: 'Devotion'
relics.desc: Since antiquity, this tribe has believed that they hold a truth about Sami: Everything originally had a voice, until 'It' spoke for all of them.
relics.usage: Ranged Operators deal 150 Arts damage to a random enemy within attack range with every attack or heal

relics.name: Celestial Dust

relics.name: Frozen Husk

relics.name: Ring of Thorns

relics.name: 'Peek into the Eternal Night'
relics.desc: The moment she turns around to head north, mountains in black lie before her eyes, just like the omen she saw many years ago.
relics.usage: All Operators gain ATK +25% and ASPD +25, but lose 25 HP every second

relics.name: 'Dead Tree's Echo'

relics.usage: All Operators recover 50 HP every second, but have Max HP -25%

relics.name: Frozen Whetstone

relics.name: Clairvoyant's Reveal
relics.desc: There is no direction you can head to avoid misfortune.
relics.usage: The DP Cost and Redeployment Time of all Operators is randomly changed

relics.name: Weave of Thorns and Leaves

relics.name: Living Woodplate

relics.name: Finshell Shield

relics.name: Empty Fowlbeast

relics.name: Rock Horn

relics.name: Lakebed Aegis

relics.name: Ancient Fresco

relics.name: Blunt Claws - Burst
relics.desc: He's already done all the reserve squad's work for them. What else do you expect?

relics.name: Blunt Claws - Proficiency

relics.desc: 'When the darkly-clad enemies rushed towards me, there were only four words on my mind — they are done for.'

relics.name: Bend Spears - Advancement
relics.desc: The soldiers stepped onto the battlefield, drew their blades, and met in battle.

relics.name: Bend Spears - Acuity
relics.desc: 'This is the 7th blade you've broken this month.' 'But I cut down eight enemies this month.'
relics.usage: Guard Operators have +25% ATK

relics.name: Bend Spears - Bloodbath

relics.desc: I wouldn't really recommend learning those skills from Blaze.

relics.name: Iron Guard - Advancement
relics.desc: The shieldbearers formed a mountain range and became the earth. What they fight against are not enemies of flesh and blood. They fight against fate and injustice.
relics.usage: Defender Operators have -3 DP Cost and +40% HP

relics.name: Iron Guard - Invasion
relics.desc: Defensive actions for the sake of teammates or strategic purposes often make people forget about their original aggressiveness.

relics.name: Iron Guard - Impenetrable
relics.desc: Every blow they endure will turn into anger and be returned severalfold.
relics.usage: Defender Operators restore 2 SP after being attacked

relics.name: Iron Guard - Consolidation
relics.desc: No matter how hard fate hits you, just take it in.

relics.name: Fatal Bolts - Advancement
relics.desc: Load, aim, and fire. Destruction arrives as scheduled.
relics.usage: Sniper Operators have -2 DP Cost and +60% HP

relics.name: Fatal Bolts - Precision

relics.name: Fatal Bolts - Divine Speed

relics.name: Broken Wand - Advancement
relics.desc: Let Arts dance around your fingertips. Call the wind and rain, unravel reality, and achieve your grand goals.

relics.name: Broken Wand - Arts Weaving
relics.desc: Those who gaze up at the great spires of Leithanien often see strange or even celestial phenomena.
relics.usage: Caster Operators have +25% ATK and +25 ASPD

relics.name: Broken Wand - Concentration
relics.desc: 'When a caster intends to go all out, they will display a completely different temperament — even if we're talking about something like Skyfire's grumpiness.'

relics.name: Broken Wand - Malediction
relics.desc: It is virtually impossible to identify when the Sarkaz first encountered Originium, and the origins of these ancient Arts have long been separated from actual reality and common sense.

relics.name: Stalwart Aid - Advancement

relics.name: Stalwart Aid - Assistance

relics.name: Stalwart Aid - Counter-Arts

relics.name: Healer's Path - Advancement
relics.desc: The desire to save lives is a virtue that mankind must applaud, for that is the support that keeps us alive.
relics.usage: Medic Operators have -2 DP Cost and +60% HP

relics.name: Healer's Path - Self-Treating
relics.desc: Who says healers can't heal themselves? They simply pop some pills before continuing to help others.
relics.usage: Increases the SP regen rate of Medic Operators by +0.3/s

relics.name: Healer's Path - Keen Hands
relics.desc: Compared to the feat of snatching a life from the grip of death, what is three days of coma afterwards?
relics.usage: Medic Operators gain +50 ASPD

relics.name: Healer's Path - Restore Sanity
relics.desc: Making one's body as solid as a nomadic city is a bit of a romanticized description, but our medics are ready to put that idea into practice.
relics.usage: Allied units within the attack range of Medic Operators gain Resistance

relics.name: Rusted Blade - Advancement
relics.desc: There may be many means, but only one end.

relics.name: Rusted Blade - Execution
relics.desc: An endless amount of rust to scrape off, and an endless amount of work.

relics.name: Rusted Blade - No Man's Land
relics.desc: Sound is eliminated the moment the shadows pass by, and whoever hears them is next.

relics.name: Rusted Blade - Spearhead Sharpening
relics.desc: 'Try this new weapon out—or did you already try it out just now?

relics.name: Hand of Buckler
relics.desc: Drop by drop, bit by bit. It is unstoppable.
relics.usage: Decel Binder, Hexer, and Abjurer Operators' attacks deal additional Arts damage equal to 3% of the target's current HP

relics.name: Hand of Diffusion
relics.desc: Strength in numbers.
relics.usage: Fortress, Chain Caster, and Blast Caster Operators recover 2 SP each time they deal damage to an enemy unit

relics.name: Hand of Superspeed
relics.desc: You swing your hand, leaving not even an afterimage.

relics.name: Hand of Purification
relics.desc: Where it is, dust is not.

relics.name: Hand of Pulverization
relics.desc: Your goal isn't just to hit the bullseye over and over.

relics.name: Hand of Flowing Water
relics.desc: The ocean's flow never ceases, because it is always surging.

relics.name: Hand of Fisticuffs
relics.desc: What she means by standing over there, is that you cannot cross.

relics.name: Hand of Adaptability

relics.name: Hand of Outburst

relics.name: Condensed Suppressant

relics.name: Antique Casting
relics.desc: 'Harken, the forge of the sky, awaits five earthborn metals'... Even though it can be used for all kinds of work, nobody understands its exact mechanism.

relics.name: Draft of a Speech
relics.desc: She was a little nervous, a little worried, but still remained resolute. When the microphone was turned on, her long ears quivered slightly.
relics.usage: All Operators cost -2 Hope to recruit

relics.name: Rusted Iron Hammer
relics.desc: 'Change is necessary, and we must do all we can to hasten the oncoming storm.'

relics.name: Four-Leaf Clover Fossil

relics.name: Acahuallan Bowl
relics.desc: Fruit is one of the locals' staples, often eaten fresh right off the tree.
relics.usage: Recover 4 Life Points, +2 Objective Shield

relics.name: Three-Dimensional Art Display
relics.desc: The impression that Rhine Lab often gives is akin to this work of art: inscrutable, multi-faceted, and impossible to sift fact from fiction.
relics.usage: Recover 7 Life Points, and recover an additional 1 Life Point after each battle

relics.name: Defender-2
relics.desc: A mass-produced defensive-type drone. It doesn't make sense how it only seems to be useful in the hands of the enemy.
relics.usage: +5 Objective Shield

relics.name: Golden Chalice
relics.desc: Saints, knights, and believers. All of them are madmen. Dear God, even the chalice itself is made of pure gold!
relics.usage: For each 5 Originium Ingots in possession, all friendly units have +7 ASPD

relics.name: 'King's Fellowship'
relics.desc: The Cultists of the Deep did not achieve success overnight; they lingered at the junction between land and sea for ages, preparing for the calamity that would come to be known as the Profound Silence.
relics.usage: +2 Objective Shield, coverts all Life Points into an equivalent amount of Objective Shield (Cannot be reduced below 1 by this effect)

relics.name: Knight Lance Pro
relics.desc: Don't worry if your own strength isn't enough! Use these tiny levers to move more, and win more in every round! The grand prize is a holiday trip to Sami!
relics.usage: Treasure Chests on the battlefield will drop more Originium Ingots

relics.name: Full-Auto Maintenance Station
relics.desc: It's a little dirty, but can run on complete full-auto. And, for reasons no one knows, even runs from morning to night when no one's using it. Raythean Industries claims to have never designed such a product.
relics.usage: Anti-Interference Index +2, but +2 Collapse value

relics.name: Warning Fence
relics.desc: The colorful decorations stand out in the snow, letting people imagine them clearly even in their dreams. The territory has no borders, but the roaming mind needs to know where fear is lurking.
relics.usage: -2 Collapse value, +2 Max Life Points

relics.name: 'Heavy Music Anthology'
relics.desc: Every winter, Columbian rescue crews stationed in southern Sami have several missions to rescue bands who get lost in the snowy woods while filming music videos.
relics.usage: -2 Collapse value, Hope +2

relics.name: Wandering Caster's Nostalgia
relics.desc: Someone has copied these notes down in a desperate attempt to remember them. The melody performed by the blade cutting through the air is strangely harmonious, but does not follow the equal temperament of music at all.
relics.usage: When entering Secluded Passage, -3 Collapse value

relics.name: Ceremony Bell
relics.desc: Close your eyes. Look inward for all that you crave.
relics.usage: Recover 1 Life Point whenever you lose Anti-Interference Index

relics.name: Northern Pioneer's Crutch
relics.desc: It can detect some types of hazards, but more importantly, it can detect coins. According to the terms of the contract, the company will only bear the costs of the Pioneers' medical insurance after a local medical institute adhering to Columbian standards has been established.
relics.usage: When Anti-Interference Index is no less than 4, gain +2 Originium Ingots whenever you enter a non-combat node

relics.name: Hunters' Insight
relics.desc: Before her will is completely wrested away, the girl begs the rescuer approaching her: 'Let me draw the bowstring, let me defeat it, let me never fear.'
relics.usage: All Operators ignore 50% DEF and RES when attacking [Collapsals], and Slow them for 0.5 sec

relics.name: Weave of Snow and Soil
relics.desc: Those within this ring receive the attention of the snow and earth.
relics.usage: Designates one deployable tile at the beginning of battle; allied Operators deployed on that tile or its surrounding 8 tiles will grant 1 SP to another Operator within those tiles whenever they gain SP from Offensive or Defensive Recovery

relics.name: Ancient Tree Fruit
relics.desc: The children of Sami made their wishes into tree seeds, and buried them in the snow. When the tree bears fruit, the first four are taken, and the smallest is left for future generations to make their wishes. The remaining fruits are tributes to Sami, praying for answers.
relics.usage: Immediately obtain 3 random trinkets

relics.name: Polar Retrofit Package
relics.desc: Proudly produced by the Volvort Kochinski Extreme Environment Equipment Testing Department. It can modify a variety of devices, adapting them for polar regions and increasing their effectiveness in cold environments.
relics.usage: When used, Support items will also be used simultaneously on the adjacent 4 tiles

relics.name: Roundstone Altar
relics.desc: Offer a sacrifice, and receive a reward. It is so convenient that the people never think about what they are directing their sacrifices to.
relics.usage: There is a chance after battle to permanently increase all allied units' ATK and DEF by 5% (Can stack up to 10 times)

relics.name: Rainbow Jar
relics.desc: It is usually placed by the Sami people wherever the rainbow falls. They are meticulously maintained in order to withstand the untraceable catastrophes, both natural and man-made.
relics.usage: Whenever an enemy enters the Objective Point, immediately selects a random Operator waiting to be re-deployable, and reduces their Redeployment Time by half

relics.name: Sprouted Stick
relics.desc: It accompanied a sturdy and swarthy Kuranta out of the country of sand, accompanied him, the Director of Rhine Lab's Scientific Investigation Section, into the silverwhite plains. Even though it was separated from its owner in an accident, it can still bring its wielder a revelation about survival.
relics.usage: Gain +2 Objective Shield when entering Bosky Passage or Lost and Found nodes

relics.name: Cannot's Mark
relics.desc: Some people are willing to do Cannot a favor, and some are worthy for Cannot to do a 'favor.'
relics.usage: Gain 1 Hope whenever you buy an item at the Rogue Trader or make an exchange at Lost and Found

relics.name: Guiding Vinedoll
relics.desc: The shamans often make these little puppets out of vines to navigate the forest. Even though they are not very accurate, striking true can conserve a lot of the survey equipment's energy.
relics.usage: Anti-Interference Index has a chance to not decrease when traveling through a vertical path

relics.name: Broken Ursus Blade
relics.desc: It was not for a lack of determination; his willpower is beyond question. It was only that, at that moment of self-determination, his body instinctively committed an irreversible mistake.
relics.usage: Gain Command EXP +10% for each level of Collapsal Paradigm

relics.name: Slytooth, Forest Destroyer
relics.desc: When it discovered that humans were willing to exchange tree fruits for wood chips, this musbeast began to unscrupulously devour the forest bark for more chips. It may not have expected that many of those chips would embody Sami's supreme will.
relics.usage: Battles have a chance to drop an extra 1 Foldartal

relics.name: Treescar Helm
relics.desc: It carries status and power, but to the warrior, it is only an artificial object for the weak to protect themselves. Some discard it to abandon their duty, some discard it only to strengthen their resolve to give up their lives.
relics.usage: +3 Hope; leads expedition in a different direction

relics.name: Boundless Gift
relics.desc: Takes root in regions unperceivable, absorbs nutrients in places unimaginable. The flowers bloom across the vastness, becoming the very first signal beacon outside the border.
relics.usage: +3 Collapse value; leads expedition in a different direction

relics.name: Routeweave Net
relics.desc: An intricate network is woven into a map that no one understands. It shows what seems to be a path that extends in all directions, but what it actually displays is only the result.
relics.usage: Additional enemies appear in battle; leads expedition in a different direction

relics.name: 'Sui's Wrath'
relics.desc: The Feranmut lifts Its head, heaven and earth cower in fear.
relics.usage: Whenever you deploy a unit, deal 3000 Arts damage to a random enemy and the area around it

relics.name: 'Civilight Eterna'
relics.desc: A small, black crown.
relics.usage: All enemies take +150% True damage

relics.name: 'End of Times'
relics.desc: As long as a new cycle has not been reached, there is still time to fix your mistakes.
relics.usage: For one time only, if you would fail any battle other than the final battle of the area or a Leader battle, you instead gain +1 Life Point and advance to the next step instead of concluding the exploration

relics.name: 'Little Gran Faro'
relics.desc: The illumination device produced after reverse engineering the Eye of Iberia. It is powerful enough to penetrate layers of dark clouds, as well as temporarily repel powerful enemies.
relics.usage: Deals Stun to all enemy units for 5 seconds every time an enemy unit enters the Objective Point

relics.name: 'Memories of The Shard'
relics.desc: 'It has pierced Victoria's heart, and is watching the empire bleed.'
relics.usage: Deals 3000 True damage to all enemy units every time an enemy unit enters the Objective Point

relics.name: 'Blindness'
relics.desc: These days, there is no one capable of determining if they still retain the structure of a Sarkaz Royal Court, or if they still have a King within. The final memory that everyone can recall is the moment when a certain Cyclopes took off the black crown atop their head.
relics.usage: When Anti-Interference Index is at 0 to 1, moving horizontally or vertically will randomly grant you Objective Shield, Originium Ingot, Hope, Anti-Interference Index, or Foldartal

relics.name: Scarred Amber
relics.desc: The elves have been left so alone on Terra that they embrace the dust with their backs to a foreign land.
relics.usage: Uncaps Anti-Interference Index Limit, and every surplus index point will grant all allied units HP +8% and ATK +8%

relics.name: Amma's Affection
relics.desc: It does love you, as is evident from the weight in your pocket, but Its love is fleeting and fickle, and you never know if what you retrieve from your pocket will be proof of Its protection or a handful of melted snow.
relics.usage: All allied units gain +1% HP, ATK, and DEF; occasionally something wonderful will happen

relics.name: Horizon Invitation
relics.desc: An invitation to the end of the icefield, distributed or sold through secret channels to those deserving. However, obtaining this invitation is merely the first step, and the test is yet to come—
relics.usage: Leads expedition in a different direction

relics.name: Dimensional Fluid
relics.desc: A raw material developed by integrating technology from multiple nations and results from deep-dives into Collapsal research. After passing the test, the Rhodes Island operator officially hands it to you along with a message: 'Deliver it safely to the end of the icefield, where Kal'tsit waits for you.'
relics.usage: Leads expedition in a different direction

relics.name: Collapsal Seed
relics.desc: Traces of Collapse remain here, refusing to be removed.
relics.usage: All friendly units have -15% ATK and -15% HP

relics.name: Fragment of Space
relics.desc: The space here has been indiscriminately torn to shreds, leaving only a tiny piece.
relics.usage: -4 Squad Size Limit

relics.name: Profound Scorchmarks
relics.desc: The boundless energy burned away their body and soul, and they will never recover.
relics.usage: -12 Max Life Point

relics.name: 'King's Crystal'
relics.desc: The Iberians' contact with the Seaborn goes back further than they can imagine, but they did not know what the Seaborn were back then.
relics.usage: At the end of battle, -2 Life Points (will not go lower than 1), +1 Hope, +5 Originium Ingots

relics.name: 'Blossom'
relics.desc: After several attempts by Touch, nature briefly opens up to you.
relics.usage: All Operators recover 1 SP every time they take damage or Elemental Injury

relics.name: Timeworn Poetry Strips
relics.desc: 'Drunk far beyond all mounts that list the realm, all beings take on souls as they demand.'
relics.usage: Summons will no longer use Deployment slots

relics.name: Hand of Unyielding
relics.desc: Nice to have, even nicer when in danger.
relics.usage: Artificers, Merchants, and Geeks will grant 3 temporary Life Points after being deployed on the field for 30 seconds (Each Operator can only trigger this once per battle)

relics.name: Hand of Return
relics.desc: Restrain death, and rouse life.
relics.usage: Multi-target Medics, Chain Medics, and Wandering Medics will heal any Operator within their range to full HP when that Operator takes critical damage (Each Operator can only trigger this once per battle)

relics.name: Blunt Claws - Fuel
relics.desc: The flames turn more intense with each additional firewood added to the pile.
relics.usage: For every Vanguard Operator on the field, gain 1 DP every 3 seconds (stacks up to 8 times)

relics.name: Bend Spears - Battlecry
relics.desc: Combat is also a group activity. The more people there are, the more confident they get, and the more powerful they become with weapons in hand.
relics.usage: For every Guard Operator on the field, all allies gain ATK +8% (stacks up to 8 times)

relics.name: Iron Guard - Rampart
relics.desc: Gather sand to form a tower, and gaze upon enemies from above.
relics.usage: For every Defender Operator on the field, all allies take 10% less physical damage (stacks up to 8 times)

relics.name: Fatal Bolts - Succession
relics.desc: Hear the sound of the first arrow, as the last pierces the torso.
relics.usage: For every Sniper Operator on the field, all allies gain ASPD +12 (stacks up to 8 times)

relics.name: Broken Wand - Harmony
relics.desc: The solos have their merits, but a chorus can destroy everything.
relics.usage: For every Caster Operator on the field, all allies deal +12% Arts damage (stacks up to 8 times)

relics.name: Stalwart Aid - Linkup
relics.desc: Hand in hand, shoulder to shoulder, brace yourselves, and look straight ahead.
relics.usage: For every Supporter Operator on the field, increases the SP regen rate of Auto Recovery skills by +0.2/s (stacks up to 8 times)

relics.name: Healer's Path - Wellspring
relics.desc: They are clear springs formed from flowing water, and they heal all that live.
relics.usage: For every Medic Operator on the field, all allies gain Redeployment Time -5% (stacks up to 8 times)

relics.name: Rusted Blade - Disturbance
relics.desc: Delay the enemy bit by bit, just like slicing a sausage, and by the time they realize it there will be nothing they can do.
relics.usage: For every Specialist Operator on the field, all enemies have -5% Movement Speed (stacks up to 8 times)

relics.name: Palmtop Pavilion
relics.desc: The Tumu Tianshi's masterpiece. Fits in one hand, but throw it to the ground and it turns into the ground floor of the Chamber of Heaven's Designs' outer pavilion. Once a secret of the Tianshi Bureaus, now mass-produced and widely used in garrisons and expeditions on the icefield.
relics.usage: All Operators gain +1 Block, and an additional +1 Block after being deployed for more than 60 seconds

relics.name: Minoan Ode
relics.desc: 'Is there a feat more worthy of praise than an expedition into no man's land? Now, yes! Go forth into the north, and write the next chapter of your saga!'
relics.usage: All Allies permanently gain HP +3% for every Emergency Ops cleared (stacks up to 15 times)

relics.name: Friston.P
relics.desc: Friston would certainly not miss out on an opportunity to explore the secrets of another predecessor civilization. Oh, but Closure didn't even consider making backups, so DON'T tell her about this!
relics.usage: All Allies permanently gain ASPD +5 for every Emergency Ops cleared (stacks up to 15 times)

relics.name: Vinecreep Mortar Gunner
relics.desc: It's no surprise such a fantastical weapon would appear when people from different cultures let down their guard and communicate with sincerity.
relics.usage: Enemies defeated while airborne will deal 3000 physical damage to surrounding enemies

relics.name: Northwind Construct
relics.desc: Though she often fails, she is still committed to helping those who would challenge their tragic fates.
relics.usage: [Machine] and [Arts Creations] enemies will be immediately Frozen with their first attack for 15 seconds

relics.name: Shattered Alliance Treaty
relics.desc: What are the Sarkaz in the eyes of others? Perhaps this object can explain everything.
relics.usage: All Operators receive 50% less damage from Sarkaz and Possessed enemies

relics.name: Paradigm Apparatus
relics.desc: Naturally, Ursus was unwilling to divulge their research into the Royal Guard to other countries. But ultimately, they caved to international pressure and shared some of their technology—after all, this was all to find the source of the demons.
relics.usage: All enemies have ASPD -30 when on tiles affected by Dominion

relics.name: Expeditioner's Field Pack
relics.desc: They always stuff their backpacks with survival supplies, then press forward with the determination and will to challenge the boundaries of the known.
relics.usage: All Operators gain ATK +60% and Resist for 15 seconds after recovering from a negative status

relics.name: Black Hole Protocol
relics.desc: This collaborative operation is unprecedented in the history books. The nations of Terra have invested a great deal of resources into the megastructure in the far north, and the NGO Rhodes Island has become the actual managing party in order to prevent the results from being concealed or tampered with.
relics.usage: When DP is maxed out, all Operators gain Max HP +150%

relics.name: Topographical Map - α
relics.desc: A hand-drawn map that exudes a sense of antiquity. The labels and corresponding terrain have been enlarged, and there seems to be something off about its scale.
relics.usage: +1 Deployment Limit, all friendly units gain +5% DEF

relics.name: Topographical Map - β
relics.desc: A hand-drawn map that exudes a sense of antiquity. The labels and corresponding terrain have been enlarged, and there seems to be something off about its scale.
relics.usage: +1 Deployment Limit, all friendly units gain +6% DEF

relics.name: Topographical Map - γ
relics.desc: A hand-drawn map that exudes a sense of antiquity. The labels and corresponding terrain have been enlarged, and there seems to be something off about its scale.
relics.usage: +1 Deployment Limit, all friendly units gain +6% DEF; for every allied unit present on the field, gain additional +0.5% DEF

relics.name: Conch of Divine Whispers - α
relics.desc: Sound it, and gods you've never seen or even heard of will answer your call. Actually, it's just a hollow conch shell.
relics.usage: +1 Deployment Limit, all friendly units gain +5% HP

relics.name: Conch of Divine Whispers - β
relics.desc: Sound it, and gods you've never seen or even heard of will answer your call. Actually, it's just a hollow conch shell.
relics.usage: +1 Deployment Limit, all friendly units gain +6% HP

relics.usage: +1 Deployment Limit, all friendly units gain +6% HP; for every allied unit present on the field, gain additional +0.5% HP

relics.name: Night-Whispers in the Forest - α
relics.desc: A special aromatherapy set prepared for field operators by the Convalescent Garden, consisting of fifteen herbal extracts in 172 different combinations. When the wind wends into wooded vales, all creatures lower their voices, and one can find respite.
relics.usage: +2 Deployment Limit, all friendly units gain +7% DEF

relics.name: Night-Whispers in the Forest - β
relics.desc: A special aromatherapy set prepared for field operators by the Convalescent Garden, consisting of fifteen herbal extracts in 172 different combinations. When the wind wends into wooded vales, all creatures lower their voices, and one can find respite.

relics.name: Church Alms Meal Voucher - α
relics.desc: In the declining coastal towns of Iberia, certain churches will provide alms in the form of meals, which their believers can redeem using vouchers. As for how these vouchers are distributed, that is a secret.
relics.usage: +2 Deployment Limit, all friendly units gain +7% HP

relics.name: Church Alms Meal Voucher - β

relics.name: Red Bow Tie - α
relics.desc: The first present Phantom gave Miss.Christine. She is really fond of it.
relics.usage: Hope +3, Deployment Limit +1

relics.name: Red Bow Tie - β
relics.desc: The first present Phantom gave Miss.Christine. She is really fond of it.
relics.usage: Hope +4, Deployment Limit +1

relics.name: Red Bow Tie - γ
relics.desc: The first present Phantom gave Miss.Christine. She is really fond of it.
relics.usage: Hope +4, Deployment Limit +1, additional Deployment Limit +2 when entering a battle from a non-combat node

relics.name: Solo Music Box - α

Before she begins her performances with Phantom, the lead actress stares blankly into the music box.
relics.usage: Hope +5, Deployment Limit +1

relics.name: Solo Music Box - β
